message:
fix(tests): update snapshots for blocked/stats format changes

Update snapshot tests to match new output format for blocked and stats
commands. Also updates version output and error message log format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,10 +2,10 @@
 source: tests/snapshots/cli_output.rs
 expression: normalize_output(&output.stdout)
 ---
